summary: Ukrainian forces have begun deploying fixed-wing UAVs carrying two FPV drones each, prompting concern among Russian milbloggers. On March 5-6, 2026, operators of the Russian "Rubicon" Center reported destroying 235 targets, including Ukrainian armored vehicles, artillery, and tanks, while intercepting over 1,500 Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs using FPV drones. In Krasny Liman, fiber-optic FPV drones captured the destruction of Ukrainian positions and armored vehicles by FAB-3000 bombs with UMPK guidance kits. Meanwhile, the U.S. and Israel reportedly struck and likely sank Iran's drone carrier "Shahid Bagheri," a 41,978-ton vessel that had joined the IRGC Navy just a year prior. Ukrainian forces also conducted a joint evacuation of a wounded soldier on the Pokrovsk axis, and the Minister of Defense highlighted challenges in meeting monthly kill targets due to limited enemy presence within drone range.
